languages.original_text: "Unfortunately, after the incident in the Sector Bionica, my colleague is in poor condition. I have heard that Vivisector Martinax is personally treating him, predicting a speedy recovery with the Omnissiah's grace. As soon as you receive word that the Genetor has been restored to functionality, we will return to this conversation."

languages.text: "К сожалению, после инцидента в Секторе Бионика, коллега находится в плачевном состоянии. Я слышал, что Вивисектор Мартинакс лично занимается его врачеванием, прогнозируя скорое восстановление, если тому будет благоволить Омниссия. Как только вам доложат о восстановлении функциональности генетора, мы вернемся к этому разговору".

"Unfortunately, after the incident in the Sector Bionica, my colleague is in poor condition. I have heard that Vivisector Martinax is personally treating him, predicting a speedy recovery with the Omnissiah's grace. As soon as you receive word that the Genetor has been restored to functionality, we will return to this conversation."

Я слышал, что Вивисектор Мартинакс лично занимается его врачеванием, прогнозируя скорое восстановление, если тому будет благоволить Омниссия. Как только вам доложат о восстановлении функциональности генетора, мы вернемся к этому разговору".

I have heard that Vivisector Martinax is personally treating him, predicting a speedy recovery with the Omnissiah's grace. As soon as you receive word that the Genetor has been restored to functionality, we will return to this conversation."

"Unfortunately, after the incident in the Sector Bionica, my colleague is in poor condition. I have heard that Vivisector Martinax is personally treating him, predicting a speedy recovery with the Omnissiah's grace. As soon as you receive word that the Genetor has been restored to functionality, we will return to this conversation."

languages.text: “很遗憾，自打仿生区出了那件事后，我那位同僚的状况就很糟。我听说解剖者马丁纳克斯正亲自为他治疗，并预言在欧姆尼赛亚的恩典下，他很快就能康复。一旦您收到那位基因士恢复运作的消息，我们便可以继续这个话题。”
languages.original_text: "Unfortunately, after the incident in the Sector Bionica, my colleague is in poor condition. I have heard that Vivisector Martinax is personally treating him, predicting a speedy recovery with the Omnissiah's grace. As soon as you receive word that the Genetor has been restored to functionality, we will return to this conversation."

traits.locale_text: “很遗憾，自打仿生区出了那件事后，我那位同僚的状况就很糟。我听说解剖者马丁纳克斯正亲自为他治疗，并预言在欧姆尼赛亚的恩典下，他很快就能康复。一旦您收到那位基因士恢复运作的消息，我们便可以继续这个话题。”

languages.text: «Por desgracia, mi colega se encuentra en mal estado a raíz del incidente en el Sector Bionica. Dicen que el vivisector Martinax lo está tratando personalmente, así que cabe esperar una pronta recuperación por la gracia del Omnissiah. Retomaremos esta conversación tan pronto le informen de que el genetor ha recuperado plenamente su funcionalidad».
languages.original_text: "Unfortunately, after the incident in the Sector Bionica, my colleague is in poor condition. I have heard that Vivisector Martinax is personally treating him, predicting a speedy recovery with the Omnissiah's grace. As soon as you receive word that the Genetor has been restored to functionality, we will return to this conversation."

traits.locale_text: «Por desgracia, mi colega se encuentra en mal estado a raíz del incidente en el Sector Bionica. Dicen que el vivisector Martinax lo está tratando personalmente, así que cabe esperar una pronta recuperación por la gracia del Omnissiah. Retomaremos esta conversación tan pronto le informen de que el genetor ha recuperado plenamente su funcionalidad».

languages.text: « Hélas, après l'incident du secteur Bionica, mon collègue est bien mal en point. On m'a dit que le vivisecteur Martinax s'occupait de lui personnellement, ce qui laisse présager un prompt rétablissement, par la grâce de l'Omnimessie. Nous reprendrons cette conversation lorsque vous aurez reçu la confirmation que le genetor est de nouveau opérationnel. »
languages.original_text: "Unfortunately, after the incident in the Sector Bionica, my colleague is in poor condition. I have heard that Vivisector Martinax is personally treating him, predicting a speedy recovery with the Omnissiah's grace. As soon as you receive word that the Genetor has been restored to functionality, we will return to this conversation."

traits.locale_text: « Hélas, après l'incident du secteur Bionica, mon collègue est bien mal en point. On m'a dit que le vivisecteur Martinax s'occupait de lui personnellement, ce qui laisse présager un prompt rétablissement, par la grâce de l'Omnimessie. Nous reprendrons cette conversation lorsque vous aurez reçu la confirmation que le genetor est de nouveau opérationnel. »

languages.text: "Bedauerlicherweise ist mein Kollege seit dem Zwischenfall im Sektor Bionica in einem schlechten Zustand. Ich hörte, dass ihn Vivisektor Martinax persönlich behandelt und eine rasche Genesung prognostiziert, so der Omnissiah will. Sobald Ihr erfahrt, dass der Genetor wieder funktionsfähig ist, werden wir diese Unterhaltung fortsetzen."
languages.original_text: "Unfortunately, after the incident in the Sector Bionica, my colleague is in poor condition. I have heard that Vivisector Martinax is personally treating him, predicting a speedy recovery with the Omnissiah's grace. As soon as you receive word that the Genetor has been restored to functionality, we will return to this conversation."

traits.locale_text: "Bedauerlicherweise ist mein Kollege seit dem Zwischenfall im Sektor Bionica in einem schlechten Zustand. Ich hörte, dass ihn Vivisektor Martinax persönlich behandelt und eine rasche Genesung prognostiziert, so der Omnissiah will. Sobald Ihr erfahrt, dass der Genetor wieder funktionsfähig ist, werden wir diese Unterhaltung fortsetzen."

languages.text: "Ne yazık ki Sektör Biyonika'daki olaydan sonra meslektaşımın durumu kötü. Dirikesimci Martinax'ın onu şahsen tedavi ettiğini ve Hermesih'in lütfuyla hızlı bir iyileşme öngördüğünü duydum. Genetör'ün yeniden işlevsellik kazandığı haberini alır almaz bu konuşmaya döneceğiz."
languages.original_text: "Unfortunately, after the incident in the Sector Bionica, my colleague is in poor condition. I have heard that Vivisector Martinax is personally treating him, predicting a speedy recovery with the Omnissiah's grace. As soon as you receive word that the Genetor has been restored to functionality, we will return to this conversation."

traits.locale_text: "Ne yazık ki Sektör Biyonika'daki olaydan sonra meslektaşımın durumu kötü. Dirikesimci Martinax'ın onu şahsen tedavi ettiğini ve Hermesih'in lütfuyla hızlı bir iyileşme öngördüğünü duydum. Genetör'ün yeniden işlevsellik kazandığı haberini alır almaz bu konuşmaya döneceğiz."

languages.text: 「残念ながら、セクター・ビオニカでの一件以来、我が同僚は思わしくない状態にあります。生体解剖官マルティナクスが直々に彼を治療し、オムニッシアの恵みによる速やかな回復を見込んでいると聞いています。ゲネターが機能を回復したとの報せを受け取り次第、我々はこの会話に立ち返りましょう」
languages.original_text: "Unfortunately, after the incident in the Sector Bionica, my colleague is in poor condition. I have heard that Vivisector Martinax is personally treating him, predicting a speedy recovery with the Omnissiah's grace. As soon as you receive word that the Genetor has been restored to functionality, we will return to this conversation."

traits.locale_text: 「残念ながら、セクター・ビオニカでの一件以来、我が同僚は思わしくない状態にあります。生体解剖官マルティナクスが直々に彼を治療し、オムニッシアの恵みによる速やかな回復を見込んでいると聞いています。ゲネターが機能を回復したとの報せを受け取り次第、我々はこの会話に立ち返りましょう」
